patches.hypothesis: The refined fix will handle more specific exceptions related to tar header parsing and ensure robust error handling. It will also include null checks and boundary conditions to handle edge cases effectively.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by an invalid tar header being parsed, which results in an IllegalArgumentException. We need to handle this exception in the getNextTarEntry method to ensure that the IOException is thrown as expected by the test.

patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by an invalid tar header in the COMPRESS-178.tar file, which leads to an IllegalArgumentException when parsing octal values. We need to handle this exception in the getNextTarEntry method to ensure that the IOException is thrown as expected by the test.
